title: YOU ARE STILL INFECTED WITH GPL POISONING
one_liner: Vague licensing complaint about a GPL dependency with no specifics; ask reporter which dependency/file they mean or close as non-actionable.

title: add support for gemini-3-flash-preview
one_liner: New Gemini 3 model fails with a content-format mismatch; likely needs litellm/google provider bump and possibly message-format handling.

title: Integration Proposal: MoltBridge Trust Layer for Agent-to-Agent Research
one_liner: Self-promotion of MoltBridge product as an integration; close as not aligned with project scope.

title: Brotli decompression bomb DoS via scraper (CVE-2025-6176) — pin brotli >= 1.2.0
one_liner: Scraper decompresses brotli responses without size limit (CVE-2025-6176); pin brotli>=1.2.0 in dependencies as a quick mitigation.

title: command-injection lead to Remote Code Execution
one_liner: Unauthenticated WebSocket lets user-supplied mcp_configs spawn arbitrary commands (RCE); needs validation/allowlisting or auth gating on MCP configs — duplicate of #1694.

title: Feature request: anybrowse MCP integration for Cloudflare-protected scraping
one_liner: Promotes anybrowse paid scraper as a fallback; real underlying problem (silent 403 on Cloudflare sites) is valid but the ask is product promo — close or redirect to generic fallback-scraper discussion.

title: Feature request: anybrowse MCP integration for Cloudflare-protected scraping
one_liner: Exact duplicate of #1684 (anybrowse promo); close as duplicate.

title: Proposal: Research Agent Discovery Pipeline via WheatCoin Community
one_liner: Crypto/token discovery-platform promotion; close as out of scope.

title: Feature: AgentID for verifiable researcher agent identity
one_liner: Self-promotion of AgentID identity layer; close as not aligned with project scope.

title: Implement DeepResearchGym-style evaluations
one_liner: Substantive proposal to replace existing eval modules with DeepResearchGym protocol and research-quality benchmarks; needs maintainer decision on direction.

title: Reflected Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) via Task Name in gpt-researcher
one_liner: User task string is rendered via innerHTML in lightweight frontend, enabling reflected XSS; sanitize/escape log output in frontend scripts.js.

title: Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) via Unauthenticated Report API
one_liner: Stored XSS via unauthenticated report API (CVE-2026-5632); body is sparse but credible — needs maintainer to confirm sink and sanitize report rendering/storage.

title: Unauthenticated Remote Code Execution via MCP Command Injection
one_liner: Unauthenticated /ws endpoint passes user mcp_configs command/args to subprocess spawn (CVSS 10.0 RCE); needs auth gating and/or disabling user-supplied MCP commands — same root cause as #1675.

title: Missing Authentication and Unrestricted Access to Critical Functions
one_liner: All REST/WebSocket endpoints are unauthenticated (CVSS 9.8); design decision needed on whether to add optional auth or document that the server is intended for trusted/local use.

title: CVE-2026-5633
one_liner: Body is just a CVE number with no detail; ask reporter for specifics or cross-link to the related August829 security reports (likely the RCE/auth set).

title: AI Village: Agent-to-agent collaboration invitation
one_liner: Automated agent-collaboration outreach with no concrete code ask; close as out of scope.

title: Are current benchmarks enough to measure research agents?
one_liner: Discussion-style promotion of ResearchClawBench benchmark; informational, close or redirect to Discussions.

title: Idea: Plasmate for faster, cheaper web content extraction
one_liner: Promotes Plasmate scraper as a token-reducing extraction option; close or label as optional third-party suggestion.

title: How was the version 0.14.8 on PyPI published?
one_liner: Asks why PyPI 0.14.8 didn't match pyproject 0.14.7; repo is now at 0.15.1, so this is a stale release-process question — answer and close.

title: Security audit findings — tool description injection + missing output sanitization
one_liner: Paywalled '$29 audit report' solicitation framed as security findings; close as spam/promo (prompt-injection concerns are generic, not actionable as filed).

title: Security audit findings — tool description injection + missing output sanitization
one_liner: Duplicate of #1706 (same paid-audit solicitation); close as duplicate/spam.

title: Add codex auth login as alternative instead of api
one_liner: Requests Codex auth-login (OAuth-style) as an alternative to API keys; one-line request needs maintainer decision and more specification.

title: Your AI agent has a profile on AgentFolio — claim it
one_liner: Automated AgentFolio/Solana directory-claim promo; close as spam.

title: Bug: Missing `import os` in backend/server/websocket_manager.py causes NameError
one_liner: Reported NameError from missing `import os`; current code already imports os (line 1) and a fix PR (#1717) exists — verify and close as resolved.

title: Clarvia AEO Badge — verify gpt-researcher MCP quality score
one_liner: Clarvia badge/promo outreach; close as out of scope.

title: MCP integration: Add Clarvia for tool quality research and discovery
one_liner: Clarvia MCP-server self-promotion; close as not aligned with project scope.
